directions.summary: Move primitive reserved names, source/backend typing, and native emission support policy behind one private owner Module.
preconditions: Inspect frontend builtins, backend IR validation, backend conversion, LLVM lowering, docs, and primitive-related tests at HEAD.
parallel_hints: Use lane-backend-runtime serially by default; docs-only inventory can run in lane-docs only if it does not modify source or tests.

directions.summary: Centralize callable-shape facts used by MLF.Backend.IR, MLF.Backend.Convert, and MLF.Backend.LLVM.Lower.
preconditions: Inspect backendCallableHead, conversion callable classification, lowering callable checks, and callable tests at HEAD.
Complete milestone-1 or prove callable-shape work does not depend on primitive inventory ownership.
parallel_hints: Use lane-backend-runtime serially; shared backend classification changes can affect multiple compilation paths.

directions.summary: Place backend/native/object-code parity policy beside ProgramMatrix and make backend tests consume it.
preconditions: Inspect ProgramMatrix, ProgramSpec, BackendLLVMSpec, frozen parity helpers, LLVMToolSupport, and native/tool availability checks at HEAD.
Complete milestones 1 and 2 or prove the parity round only inventories current policy without changing behavior.
parallel_hints: Use lane-backend-runtime serially by default; pure policy inventory may run in lane-docs only if it does not change coverage.

directions.summary: Extract backend-emission semantic preparation from CLI orchestration into a backend-owned Adapter.
preconditions: Inspect CLI source loading, Prelude retention pruning, checked-program conversion, backend rendering paths, app/Main.hs, and backend emission tests at HEAD.
Complete milestones 1 through 3 or prove the selected CLI slice is isolated from primitive, callable-shape, and parity policy.
parallel_hints: Use lane-backend-runtime serially; CLI, backend conversion, and tests share execution paths.

directions.summary: Replace raw-field coupling around the Prepared Generalization Artifact with capability Adapters for the known consumers.
preconditions: Inspect MLF.Elab.Run.Generalize.Prepare, MLF.Elab.Run.Pipeline, result-type reconstruction, root generalization, and focused generalization/elaboration tests at HEAD.
parallel_hints: Use lane-elaboration serially; elaboration signatures are shared and can churn across many callers.

directions.summary: Tighten the production MLF.Constraint.Finalize Interface and move internal/testing mechanics behind owner-local seams.
preconditions: Inspect MLF.Constraint.Finalize, MLF.Constraint.Presolution.View, MLF.Constraint.Solved.Internal, solved/test-support modules, reify tests, and Snapshot Finalization guard tests at HEAD.
Complete milestone-5 or prove the selected Snapshot Finalization slice is independent of Prepared Generalization Artifact ownership.
parallel_hints: Use lane-elaboration serially; this touches constraint finalization, presolution read-model access, solved internals, and tests.
